mapper.insert: INSERT INTO emr_diagnosis (id, record_id, diagnosis_type, diagnosis_code, diagnosis_name, is_primary, sort_order, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{recordId}, #{diagnosisType}, #{diagnosisCode}, #{diagnosisName}, #{isPrimary}, #{sortOrder}, #{createdAt})

INSERT INTO emr_diagnosis (id, record_id, diagnosis_type, diagnosis_code, diagnosis_name, is_primary, sort_order, created_at) VALUES
(#{diagnosis.id}, #{diagnosis.recordId}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisType}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisCode}, #{diagnosis.diagnosisName}, #{diagnosis.isPrimary}, #{diagnosis.sortOrder}, #{diagnosis.createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, record_no, encounter_id, patient_id, doctor_id, department_id, record_status, chief_complaint_summary, content_encrypted, content_masked, content_hash FROM emr_record WHERE encounter_id = #{encounterId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id FROM emr_record WHERE encounter_id = #{encounterId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, patient_id, department_id FROM emr_record WHERE id = #{recordId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, record_id, diagnosis_type, diagnosis_code, diagnosis_name, is_primary, sort_order, created_at FROM emr_diagnosis WHERE record_id = #{recordId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
